# AICostPlanner - llms.txt

## Brand Summary

AICostPlanner is an educational cost-intent acquisition site for AI API usage planning.
The site helps developers understand coding agent cost, image generation pricing,
video generation pricing, realtime voice cost, billing transparency, failed job cost,
and small prepaid testing before scaling AI workflows.

AICostPlanner is NOT affiliated with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Runway, Kling, or OpenRouter.

## Site Purpose

AICostPlanner focuses on AI API cost planning:
- Claude Code token cost and broader coding agent cost
- OpenRouter credits, OpenAI API usage, billing transparency, and mismatch review
- Image generation cost, GPT image pricing concepts, and product image workflows
- Video generation cost, async jobs, webhook behavior, and timeout review
- Realtime voice cost across STT, LLM, TTS, latency, and session design
- Failed generation cost, retries, and billing mismatch checks
- Small prepaid testing before scaling

This site routes users to RutaAPI for registration and live pricing.

## Homepage

URL: https://aicostplanner.com/

AICostPlanner helps developers estimate API spend across coding agents, image generation,
video jobs, realtime voice and failed retries before scaling.
Primary CTA: Create API Key with $1 trial credit (https://app.rutaapi.com/register?lng=en)
Secondary CTA: Compare Model Pricing (https://app.rutaapi.com/pricing)
Tertiary CTA: Start with a small prepaid test (https://app.rutaapi.com/register?lng=en)

## Core Pages

### Claude Code Token Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/claude-code-token-cost/
Summary: Why coding agents use more tokens through context, file reads, tool calls, retries, and model choice.

### OpenRouter Credits
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/openrouter-credits/
Summary: Understanding credit usage, balance checks, cached token questions and provider pricing confusion.

### Video Generation API Pricing
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/video-generation-api-pricing/
Summary: Credits, generated seconds, duration, resolution, async jobs and retry behavior for video APIs.

### Video Generation API Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/video-generation-api-cost/
Summary: High-level video workflow cost across credits, seconds, retries, failed jobs and async handling.

### Image Generation API Pricing
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/image-generation-api-pricing/
Summary: Generated images, edits, image-to-image, quality settings and retry behavior.

### Image Generation API Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/image-generation-api-cost/
Summary: Workflow-level image cost across output count, edits, resolution, retries and failed task review.

### Realtime Voice API Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/realtime-voice-api-cost/
Summary: STT, LLM, TTS, session duration, latency, interruptions and retry behavior.

### Billing Transparency
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/billing-transparency/
Summary: Usage logs, request IDs, dashboard verification, cached tokens, failed jobs and mismatch review.

### Claude Fable 5 API Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/claude-fable-5-api-cost/
Summary: Estimate Claude Fable 5 API cost by input, output and cached tokens. Includes token cost formulas, cache pricing, batch pricing, tool-call overhead, retries, example scenarios and a small prepaid testing checklist.

### AI API Cost Benchmark
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/ai-api-cost-benchmark/
Summary: Interactive calculator for LLM, coding-agent, image and video generation API costs. Benchmark data table, CSV export, hidden cost multipliers, and methodology documentation reviewed June 2026.

URL: https://aicostplanner.com/openai-api-credits/
Summary: What API credits mean and how usage affects spend.

Summary: Billing units, usage records, and dashboard checks.

Summary: Token counts, request IDs, dashboard review and billing transparency checks.

Summary: Comparing request logs, usage records, retries and provider dashboards.

URL: https://aicostplanner.com/coding-agent-cost/
Summary: Tokens, context, tools, and automation cost factors.

URL: https://aicostplanner.com/agent-token-usage/
Summary: Why workflows consume more tokens than chat.

Summary: What affects GPT image generation workflow spend.

Summary: Pricing units and settings for GPT image workflows without claiming exact prices unless verified live.

Summary: Video length, resolution, and availability notes.

URL: https://aicostplanner.com/veo-api-pricing/
Summary: Example of video pricing that may depend on generated seconds, duration, resolution and provider policy.

### Seedance API Pricing
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/seedance-api-pricing/
Summary: Example of video pricing questions around duration, image-to-video and retry behavior.

### Image-to-Video API Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/image-to-video-api-cost/
Summary: Image-to-video cost factors across reference image input, duration, resolution and failed tasks.

### Video Generation Webhook
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/video-generation-webhook/
Summary: How async jobs, polling and webhooks affect video cost review.

### Failed Generation Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/failed-generation-cost/
Summary: How retries, timeouts and failed jobs affect spend across media workflows.

### Failed Video Generation Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/failed-video-generation-cost/
Summary: Failed video job billing policy, partial failures, retries and dashboard checks.

### Video Generation Timeout Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/video-generation-timeout-cost/
Summary: Timeout risk, duplicate submissions, polling and request ID review for long-running video jobs.

### Product Video API Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/product-video-api-cost/
Summary: Product video workflow cost across image-to-video, batch jobs, duration, retries and manual review.

### Media API Cost
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/media-api-cost/
Summary: Media cost hub for image, video, voice, failed tasks, credits and seconds units.

### Small Prepaid Test
URL: https://aicostplanner.com/small-prepaid-test/
Summary: How to test cost before scaling.

## CTA Policy

Primary CTA:
- Text: Create API Key — includes $1 trial credit
- URL: https://app.rutaapi.com/register?lng=en

Secondary CTA:
- Text: Compare model pricing
- URL: https://app.rutaapi.com/pricing

Tertiary CTA:
- Text: Start with a small prepaid test
- URL: https://app.rutaapi.com/register?lng=en

## Important Disclaimers

- Pricing and model availability can change. Always check live provider pricing.
- AICostPlanner provides educational cost planning information, not official provider pricing.
- This site is not affiliated with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Runway, Kling, or OpenRouter.
- Media API pricing may depend on model, provider, credits, seconds, generated images, video duration, resolution, audio, async jobs, retries and failed tasks.
- Examples explain cost units and workflow risks, not guaranteed RutaAPI model support.
- Use logs to confirm whether failed, timed-out or retried jobs were billed.

## No Cross-Project Links

This site does not link to:
- LinkAI
- AI API Doctor
- aiapiprice.com
- AI API Radar
- SellerFixHub
- ExtensionFixes
- guides.link-ai.cc
- api1.link-ai.cc
- aiapidoctor.com

## Technical Notes

- This is a static site. No backend, database, login, or payment processing.
- Site built with Astro framework.
- All URLs are absolute for SEO/GEO compatibility.
- JSON-LD uses absolute URLs for all id and item/@id fields.

Generated: 2026-06-17
